    91	            "file",
    92	            "folder",
    93	            "structure",
    94	            "analyze",
    95	            "분석",
    96	            "구조",
    97	            "프로젝트",
    98	            "저장소",
    99	            "파일",
   100	            "디렉터리",
   101	            "읽",
   102	            "검색",
   103	            "확인",
   104	        )
   105	    ):
   106	        return _by_id("tool_oriented")
   107	    return _by_id("simple_answer")
   108	
   109	
   110	def candidate_strategies(prompt: str, limit: int = 3, goldens_root: Path = GOLDENS_ROOT) -> list[StrategyDecision]:
   111	    text = prompt.lower()
   112	    if any(
   113	        token in text
   114	        for token in (
   115	            "현재 내 프로젝트 분석",
   116	            "현재 프로젝트 구조 분석",
   117	            "프로젝트 구조 분석",
   118	        )
   119	    ):
   120	        return [_by_id("tool_oriented")]
   121	
   122	    primary = infer_golden_strategy_hint(prompt, goldens_root=goldens_root) or choose_strategy(prompt)
   123	    ordered = [primary]
   124	
   125	    if primary.strategy_id == "tool_oriented":
   126	        ordered.extend([_by_id("planning"), _by_id("simple_answer")])
   127	    elif primary.strategy_id == "planning":
   128	        ordered.extend([_by_id("tool_oriented"), _by_id("simple_answer")])
   129	    elif primary.strategy_id == "long_form":
   130	        ordered.extend([_by_id("simple_answer")])
   131	    elif primary.strategy_id == "simple_answer":
   132	        ordered.extend([_by_id("tool_oriented")])
   133	
   134	    deduped: list[StrategyDecision] = []
   135	    seen: set[str] = set()
   136	    for item in ordered:
   137	        if item.strategy_id in seen:
   138	            continue
   139	        seen.add(item.strategy_id)
   140	        deduped.append(item)
   141	    return deduped[:limit]
   142	
   143	
   144	def infer_golden_strategy_hint(prompt: str, goldens_root: Path = GOLDENS_ROOT) -> StrategyDecision | None:
   145	    if not goldens_root.exists():
   146	        return None
   147	    prompt_tokens = _tokenize(prompt)
   148	    if not prompt_tokens:
   149	        return None
   150	
   151	    best_score = 0.0
   152	    best_prompt = None
   153	    for prompt_path in goldens_root.glob("*/prompt.txt"):
   154	        golden_prompt = prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()
   155	        golden_tokens = _tokenize(golden_prompt)
   156	        if not golden_tokens:
   157	            continue
   158	        overlap = len(prompt_tokens & golden_tokens)
   159	        union = len(prompt_tokens | golden_tokens)
   160	        score = overlap / union if union else 0.0
   161	        if score > best_score:
   162	            best_score = score
   163	            best_prompt = golden_prompt
   164	
   165	    if best_prompt is None or best_score < 0.55:
   166	        return None
   167	    return choose_strategy(best_prompt)
   168	
   169	
   170	def _tokenize(text: str) -> set[str]:
   171	    normalized = (
   172	        text.lower()
   173	        .replace(".", " ")
   174	        .replace(",", " ")
   175	        .replace(":", " ")
   176	        .replace("/", " ")
   177	        .replace("-", " ")
   178	        .replace("_", " ")
   179	        .replace("\n", " ")
   180	    )
   181	    return {token for token in normalized.split() if len(token) >= 2}
   182	
   183	
   184	def _by_id(strategy_id: str) -> StrategyDecision:
   185	    for item in STRATEGY_LIBRARY:
   186	        if item.strategy_id == strategy_id:
   187	            return item
   188	    raise KeyError(strategy_id)

    10	from .adaptive import AdaptiveSummary, summarize_attempt_progress

    15	from .memory import MemoryTurn, render_memory_context

    25	from .policy import infer_prompt_policy

    27	
    28	
    29	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    30	class ObservationRunResult:
    31	    capture: SavedCapturePaths
    32	    promoted_example_dir: Path | None
    33	    comparison_results: list[BaselineComparison]
    34	    summary_path: Path | None
    35	    strategy: StrategyDecision
    36	    attempted_strategies: list[str]
    37	    orchestration: OrchestrationDecision
    38	    request_user_input_path: Path | None
    39	    adaptive_summary: AdaptiveSummary
    40	    approval_request_path: Path | None
    41	
    42	
    43	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    44	class AttemptResult:
    45	    capture: SavedCapturePaths
    46	    comparison_results: list[BaselineComparison]
    47	    strategy: StrategyDecision
    48	    orchestration: OrchestrationDecision
    49	
    50	
    51	def observe_prompt(
    52	    *,
    53	    prompt: str,
    54	    profile: str,
    55	    cwd: Path,
    56	    captures_dir: Path,
    57	    promote_dir: Path | None = None,
    58	    baselines_dir: Path | None = None,
    59	    example_id: str | None = None,
    60	    memory_turns: list[MemoryTurn] | None = None,
    61	    request_user_input_response_path: Path | None = None,
    62	    approval_response_path: Path | None = None,
    63	    runner=run_capture,
    64	) -> ObservationRunResult:
    65	    attempts: list[AttemptResult] = []
    66	    strategies = candidate_strategies(prompt)
    67	    retry_appendix = ""
    68	    memory_prefix = render_memory_context(memory_turns or [])
    69	    user_input_prefix = render_request_user_input_response(request_user_input_response_path)
    70	    approval_prefix = render_approval_response(approval_response_path)
    71	    for attempt_index, strategy in enumerate(strategies, start=1):
    72	        policy = infer_prompt_policy(prompt, strategy)
    73	        instructions = build_full_instructions(strategy, policy)
    74	        steered_prompt = (
    75	            memory_prefix
    76	            + approval_prefix
    77	            + user_input_prefix
    78	            + instructions
    79	            + "\n\n"
    80	            + render_user_request(prompt)
    81	            + retry_appendix
    82	        )
    83	        command = build_exec_command(prompt=steered_prompt, profile=profile, cwd=cwd, strategy=strategy)
    84	        result: LiveCaptureResult = runner(command, cwd=cwd)
    85	        saved = save_capture_session(
    86	            result=result,
    87	            prompt=prompt,
    88	            output_root=captures_dir / f"attempt-{attempt_index}-{strategy.strategy_id}",
    89	        )
    90	        comparison_results: list[BaselineComparison] = []
    91	        if baselines_dir and saved.normalized_path:
    92	            comparison_results = compare_capture_against_baselines(
    93	                normalized_path=saved.normalized_path,
    94	                baselines_root=baselines_dir,
    95	            )
    96	        orchestration = decide_orchestration(
    97	            strategy=strategy,
    98	            comparison_results=comparison_results,
    99	            has_normalized_output=saved.normalized_path is not None,
   100	            prompt=prompt,
   101	        )
   102	        attempts.append(
   103	            AttemptResult(
   104	                capture=saved,
   105	                comparison_results=comparison_results,
   106	                strategy=strategy,
   107	                orchestration=orchestration,
   108	            )
   109	        )
   110	        closest_match = best_comparison_match(comparison_results)
   111	        retry_appendix = build_retry_appendix(
   112	            orchestration.retry_reason,
   113	            closest_match_example_id=closest_match.example_id if closest_match else None,
   114	            closest_match_score=closest_match.score if closest_match else None,
   115	        )
   116	        if any(item.matches for item in comparison_results):
   117	            break
   118	
   119	    best_attempt = select_best_attempt(attempts)
   120	    strategy = best_attempt.strategy
   121	    saved = best_attempt.capture
   122	    comparison_results = best_attempt.comparison_results
   123	    orchestration = best_attempt.orchestration
   124	    request_user_input_path: Path | None = None
   125	    approval_request_path: Path | None = None
   126	    if orchestration.requires_approval:
   127	        approval_request_path = write_approval_artifact(session_dir=saved.session_dir, prompt=prompt)
   128	    if orchestration.should_request_user_input:
   129	        request_user_input_path = write_request_user_input_artifact(session_dir=saved.session_dir, prompt=prompt)
   130	    adaptive_summary = summarize_attempt_progress([attempt.comparison_results for attempt in attempts])
   131	
   132	    promoted_example_dir: Path | None = None
   133	    if promote_dir and saved.normalized_path:
   134	        promoted_example_dir = promote_capture_to_example(
   135	            capture_dir=saved.session_dir,
   136	            output_root=promote_dir,
   137	            example_id=example_id or slugify_prompt(prompt),
   138	            prompt=prompt,
   139	        )
   140	
   141	    summary_path: Path | None = None
   142	    if baselines_dir and saved.normalized_path:
   143	        summary_path = saved.session_dir / "comparison-summary.md"
   144	        summary_path.write_text(
   145	            build_comparison_summary(
   146	                prompt=prompt,
   147	                strategy=strategy,
   148	                orchestration=orchestration,
   149	                comparison_results=comparison_results,
   150	                promoted_example_dir=promoted_example_dir,
   151	                attempted_strategies=[attempt.strategy.strategy_id for attempt in attempts],
   152	                adaptive_summary=adaptive_summary,
   153	            )
   154	            + "\n",
   155	            encoding="utf-8",
   156	        )
   157	
   158	    return ObservationRunResult(
   159	        capture=saved,
   160	        promoted_example_dir=promoted_example_dir,
   161	        comparison_results=comparison_results,
   162	        summary_path=summary_path,
   163	        strategy=strategy,
   164	        attempted_strategies=[attempt.strategy.strategy_id for attempt in attempts],
   165	        orchestration=orchestration,
   166	        request_user_input_path=request_user_input_path,
   167	        adaptive_summary=adaptive_summary,
   168	        approval_request_path=approval_request_path,
   169	    )
   170	
   171	
   172	def select_best_attempt(attempts: list[AttemptResult]) -> AttemptResult:
   173	    if not attempts:
   174	        raise ValueError("at least one attempt is required")
   175	
   176	    def score_attempt(attempt: AttemptResult) -> tuple[int, int, int, int]:
   177	        if not attempt.comparison_results:
   178	            return (1, 10_000, 1, 10_000)
   179	        best = min(item.score for item in attempt.comparison_results)
   180	        match_bonus = 0 if any(item.matches for item in attempt.comparison_results) else 1
   181	        retry_penalty = 1 if attempt.orchestration.should_retry else 0
   182	        return (match_bonus, best, retry_penalty, len(attempt.comparison_results))
   183	
   184	    return min(attempts, key=score_attempt)
   185	
   186	
   187	def build_comparison_summary(
   188	    *,
   189	    prompt: str,
   190	    strategy: StrategyDecision,
   191	    orchestration: OrchestrationDecision,
   192	    comparison_results: list[BaselineComparison],
   193	    promoted_example_dir: Path | None,
   194	    attempted_strategies: list[str],
   195	    adaptive_summary: AdaptiveSummary,
   196	) -> str:
   197	    sorted_results = sorted(
   198	        comparison_results,
   199	        key=lambda item: (
   200	            not item.matches,
   201	            len(item.details),
   202	            item.example_id,
   203	        ),
   204	    )
   205	    lines = [
   206	        "# Observation Summary",
   207	        "",
   208	        "## Prompt",
   209	        prompt,
   210	        "",
   211	        "## Strategy",
   212	        f"{strategy.strategy_id} -> {strategy.baseline_example_id}",
   213	        "",
   214	        "## Attempted Strategies",
   215	        ", ".join(attempted_strategies) if attempted_strategies else "none",
   216	        "",
   217	        "## Orchestration Policy",
   218	        orchestration.policy_summary,
   219	        "",
   220	        "## Adaptive Summary",

    12	class PromptPolicy:

    27	    preferred_roots=("src", "tests", "README.md", "pyproject.toml"),

    35	def infer_prompt_policy(prompt: str, strategy: StrategyDecision | None = None) -> PromptPolicy:
    36	    text = prompt.lower()
    37	    review_prompt = any(
    38	        token in text

    40	            "review",

    55	            "structure",
    56	        )
    57	    )
    58	    inspection_prompt = any(
    59	        token in text
    60	        for token in (

    82	    verification_prompt = any(token in text for token in ("test", "verify", "pytest", "check"))
    83	
    84	    if review_prompt:
    85	        return PromptPolicy(
    86	            prompt_mode="code_review",

   106	    if inspection_prompt and verification_prompt:

   137	            fallback_tool="bash",
   138	        )
   139	    return DEFAULT_POLICY
   140	def rank_roma_attempt(prompt: str, attempt) -> tuple[int, int, int, int, int, str]:
   141	    policy = infer_prompt_policy(prompt, getattr(attempt, "strategy", None))
   142	    rows = read_jsonl(attempt.result.normalized_path) if attempt.result.normalized_path.exists() else []
   143	    tool_rows = [row for row in rows if row.get("event_type") in {"tool_call_request", "tool_call_result"}]
   144	    tool_names = [row.get("payload", {}).get("tool_name", "") for row in tool_rows]
   145	    final_message = extract_attempt_message(rows)
   146	    inspection_without_tools_penalty = 0
   147	    substantive_evidence_penalty = 0
   148	    planning_penalty = 0
   149	
   150	    preferred_tool_penalty = 0
   151	    if policy.prompt_mode in {"structure_inspection", "repository_inspection", "inspection_and_verification"} and not tool_rows:
   152	        inspection_without_tools_penalty = 1
   153	    if policy.prompt_mode.startswith("repository_") or policy.prompt_mode == "inspection_and_verification":
   154	        if not any(name in policy.preferred_tools for name in tool_names):
   155	            preferred_tool_penalty = 1
   156	    if policy.prompt_mode == "structure_inspection":
   157	        if not any(name in {"list_dir", "glob_paths", "read_file"} for name in tool_names):
   158	            substantive_evidence_penalty = 1
   159	    elif policy.prompt_mode == "repository_inspection":
   160	        if not tool_rows:
   161	            substantive_evidence_penalty = 1
   162	        lowered = final_message.lower()
   163	        if any(token in lowered for token in ("보류", "실행 계획", "붙여주시면", "실행해야 할", "분석 계획")):
   164	            planning_penalty = 1
   165	    elif policy.prompt_mode == "code_review":
   166	        lowered = final_message.lower()
   167	        if not tool_rows:
   168	            substantive_evidence_penalty = 1
   169	        if "bash" not in tool_names:
   170	            preferred_tool_penalty = 1
   171	        if "prioritized" not in lowered and "risk" not in lowered and "finding" not in lowered:
   172	            substantive_evidence_penalty = 1
   173	
   174	    access_fallback_penalty = 1 if looks_like_access_fallback(final_message) else 0
   175	    empty_fallback_penalty = 1 if is_empty_runtime_fallback(final_message) else 0
   176	    over_budget_penalty = 1 if len(tool_rows) > policy.tool_budget * 2 else 0
   177	    comparison_score = getattr(attempt, "comparison_score", 10_000)
   178	    comparison_matches = getattr(attempt, "comparison_matches", 0)
   179	    prompt_match_score = getattr(attempt, "prompt_match_score", 10_000)
   180	    near_golden_bonus = 0 if comparison_matches > 0 and comparison_score <= 1 else 1
   181	
   182	    return (
   183	        prompt_match_score,
   184	        comparison_matches == 0,
   185	        near_golden_bonus,
   186	        inspection_without_tools_penalty,
   187	        access_fallback_penalty,
   188	        empty_fallback_penalty,
   189	        planning_penalty,
   190	        substantive_evidence_penalty,
   191	        preferred_tool_penalty,
   192	        over_budget_penalty,
   193	        comparison_score,
   194	        getattr(attempt.strategy, "strategy_id", ""),
   195	    )
   196	
   197	
   198	def extract_attempt_message(rows: list[dict]) -> str:
   199	    for row in reversed(rows):
   200	        if row.get("event_type") == "assistant_message":
   201	            text = row.get("payload", {}).get("text", "") or ""
   202	            if is_empty_runtime_fallback(text):
   203	                synthesized = _synthesize_tool_result_summary(rows)
   204	                return synthesized or text
   205	            return text
   206	    return ""
   207	
   208	
   209	def _synthesize_tool_result_summary(rows: list[dict]) -> str | None:
   210	    tool_results = [row for row in rows if row.get("event_type") == "tool_call_result"]
   211	    if not tool_results:
   212	        return None
   213	    parts: list[str] = []
   214	    for row in tool_results[:3]:
   215	        tool_name = row.get("payload", {}).get("tool_name", "tool")
   216	        output = str(row.get("payload", {}).get("output", "")).strip()
   217	        if not output:
   218	            continue
   219	        preview = "; ".join(output.splitlines()[:3])
   220	        parts.append(f"{tool_name}: {preview}")

    17	
    18	
    19	DEFAULT_ROMA_ROOT = Path("/Users/user/project/Opus_Aggregator/roma-cli")
    20	
    21	
    22	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    23	class RomaChatResult:
    24	    final_message: str | None
    25	    session_dir: Path
    26	    normalized_path: Path

    28	    stdout_path: Path
    29	    stderr_path: Path

    31	
    32	
    33	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    34	class RomaAttemptResult:
    35	    result: RomaChatResult

    37	    comparison_score: int

    40	
    41	
    42	def run_roma_chat(
    43	    *,
    44	    prompt: str,
    45	    history: list[MemoryTurn],
    46	    captures_dir: Path,
    47	    cwd: Path,
    48	    instructions: str,
    49	    enable_tools: bool,
    50	    policy: PromptPolicy | None = None,
    51	    model: str = "gpt-5.3-codex-spark",
    52	    roma_root: Path = DEFAULT_ROMA_ROOT,
    53	) -> RomaChatResult:
    54	    bridge_script = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "scripts" / "roma_bridge.mjs"
    55	    payload = {
    56	        "prompt": prompt,
    57	        "history": [{"role": turn.role, "content": turn.text} for turn in history],
    58	        "model": model,
    59	        "instructions": instructions,
    60	        "enableTools": enable_tools,
    61	        "cwd": str(cwd),
    62	        "policy": {
    63	            "promptMode": policy.prompt_mode,
    64	            "toolBudget": policy.tool_budget,

     2	
     3	from __future__ import annotations
     4	
     5	import argparse
     6	import json

    10

    39	from .workflow import observe_prompt
    40	
    41	DEFAULT_RUNTIME_PROFILE = "roma_ws"
    42	DEFAULT_OBSERVE_PROFILE = "openai_ws"
    43	
    44	
    45	def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    46	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
    47	        prog="autonomos",
    48	        description="Capture and normalize Codex CLI observation traces.",
    49	    )
    50	    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command")
    51	
    52	    subparsers.add_parser("version", help="Print tool version.")
    53	
    54	    build_examples = subparsers.add_parser("build-examples", help="Generate the first 10 observation examples.")
    55	    build_examples.add_argument(
    56	        "--output-dir",
    57	        default="examples",
    58	        help="Directory where example datasets will be written.",
    59	    )
    60	
    61	    print_ws = subparsers.add_parser("print-ws-config", help="Print Codex config TOML for websocket-based capture.")
    62	    print_ws.add_argument("--output", help="Optional output path for config.toml")
    63	    print_ws.add_argument("--describe-runtime", action="store_true", help="Also print derived runtime websocket auth metadata.")
    64	
    65	    capture_live = subparsers.add_parser("capture-live", help="Run codex exec and capture stdout/stderr.")
    66	    capture_live.add_argument("prompt", help="Prompt to send to codex exec.")
    67	    capture_live.add_argument("--profile", default=DEFAULT_OBSERVE_PROFILE, help="Codex profile name.")
    68	    capture_live.add_argument("--cwd", default=".", help="Working directory for codex exec.")
    69	    capture_live.add_argument("--output-dir", default="captures", help="Directory where live capture sessions will be stored.")
    70	
    71	    compare = subparsers.add_parser("compare", help="Compare two normalized JSONL traces structurally.")
    72	    compare.add_argument("expected", help="Expected normalized.jsonl path.")
    73	    compare.add_argument("actual", help="Actual normalized.jsonl path.")
    74	
    75	    normalize_exec = subparsers.add_parser("normalize-exec", help="Normalize codex exec JSONL into shared schema JSONL.")
    76	    normalize_exec.add_argument("input", help="Path to raw codex exec JSONL.")
    77	    normalize_exec.add_argument("output", help="Path to write normalized JSONL.")
    78	
    79	    promote = subparsers.add_parser("promote-capture", help="Promote a saved capture session into example dataset format.")
    80	    promote.add_argument("capture_dir", help="Capture session directory.")
    81	    promote.add_argument("example_id", help="New example id.")
    82	    promote.add_argument("--output-dir", default="examples_live", help="Directory where promoted examples are stored.")
    83	    promote.add_argument("--prompt", help="Optional prompt override.")
    84	
    85	    compare_baselines = subparsers.add_parser("compare-baselines", help="Compare a normalized capture against all baseline examples.")
    86	    compare_baselines.add_argument("normalized", help="Path to normalized capture JSONL.")
    87	    compare_baselines.add_argument("--baselines-dir", default="examples", help="Baseline examples directory.")
    88	    compare_baselines.add_argument("--top", type=int, default=5, help="Maximum number of comparisons to print.")
    89	
    90	    import_golden = subparsers.add_parser("import-golden", help="Import a normalized trace as a repo-tracked golden example.")
    91	    import_golden.add_argument("normalized", help="Path to normalized JSONL trace.")
    92	    import_golden.add_argument("example_id", help="Golden example id.")
    93	    import_golden.add_argument("prompt", help="Prompt associated with the trace.")
    94	    import_golden.add_argument("--output-dir", default="goldens", help="Directory where golden traces are stored.")
    95	
    96	    import_capture_golden = subparsers.add_parser("import-capture-golden", help="Import a saved capture directory as a repo-tracked golden example.")
    97	    import_capture_golden.add_argument("capture_dir", help="Capture session directory containing normalized.jsonl and prompt.txt.")
    98	    import_capture_golden.add_argument("example_id", help="Golden example id.")
    99	    import_capture_golden.add_argument("--output-dir", default="goldens", help="Directory where golden traces are stored.")
   100	    import_capture_golden.add_argument("--prompt", help="Optional prompt override.")
   101	
   102	    import_golden_raw = subparsers.add_parser("import-golden-raw", help="Normalize a raw exec trace and import it as a golden example.")
   103	    import_golden_raw.add_argument("raw", help="Path to raw exec JSONL trace.")
   104	    import_golden_raw.add_argument("example_id", help="Golden example id.")
   105	    import_golden_raw.add_argument("prompt", help="Prompt associated with the trace.")
   106	    import_golden_raw.add_argument("--output-dir", default="goldens", help="Directory where golden traces are stored.")
   107	
   108	    list_goldens = subparsers.add_parser("list-goldens", help="List repo-tracked golden traces.")
   109	    list_goldens.add_argument("--goldens-dir", default="goldens", help="Directory where golden traces are stored.")
   110	
   111	    show_core_families = subparsers.add_parser("show-core-families", help="List the core Codex prompt families used for live trace capture.")
   112	    show_core_families.add_argument("--families-path", default=str(DEFAULT_CORE_PROMPT_FAMILIES_PATH), help="Path to core prompt family JSON.")
   113	
   114	    capture_codex_family = subparsers.add_parser("capture-codex-family", help="Capture a real Codex trace for a configured prompt family.")
   115	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("family_id", help="Configured family id from core_prompt_families.json")
   116	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("--families-path", default=str(DEFAULT_CORE_PROMPT_FAMILIES_PATH), help="Path to core prompt family JSON.")
   117	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("--cwd", default=".", help="Working directory for Codex execution.")
   118	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("--output-dir", default="codex_traces", help="Directory where canonical Codex trace captures are stored.")
   119	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("--goldens-dir", default="goldens", help="Directory where golden traces are stored.")
   120	    capture_codex_family.add_argument("--promote-to-golden", action="store_true", help="Also import the captured normalized trace into the goldens directory.")
   121

1	"""Promote captures into example datasets and compare against baselines."""
     2	
     3	from __future__ import annotations
     4	
     5	import json
     6	import shutil
     7	from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass
     8	from pathlib import Path
     9	
    10	from .compare import ComparisonResult, compare_normalized_sequences
    11	from .io import read_jsonl
    12	from .reports import build_report
    13	
    14	
    15	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    16	class BaselineComparison:
    17	    example_id: str
    18	    matches: bool
    19	    summary: str
    20	    details: list[str]
    21	    score: int
    22	
    23	
    24	def best_comparison_match(results: list[BaselineComparison]) -> BaselineComparison | None:
    25	    if not results:
    26	        return None
    27	    return min(results, key=lambda item: (item.score, not item.matches, item.example_id))
    28	
    29	
    30	def format_comparison_results(results: list[BaselineComparison], limit: int | None = None) -> list[str]:
    31	    ordered = sorted(results, key=lambda item: (item.score, not item.matches, item.example_id))
    32	    if limit is not None:
    33	        ordered = ordered[:limit]
    34	    lines: list[str] = []
    35	    for result in ordered:
    36	        status = "MATCH" if result.matches else "DIFF"
    37	        line = f"{status} {result.example_id}: score={result.score} {result.summary}"
    38	        if result.details:
    39	            line += f" ({result.details[0]})"
    40	        lines.append(line)
    41	    return lines
    42	
    43	
    44	def build_golden_registry(goldens_root: Path) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
    45	    rows: list[dict[str, object]] = []
    46	    for example_dir in sorted(path for path in goldens_root.iterdir() if path.is_dir()):
    47	        meta_path = example_dir / "meta.json"
    48	        prompt_path = example_dir / "prompt.txt"
    49	        normalized_path = example_dir / "normalized.jsonl"
    50	        meta: dict[str, object] = {}
    51	        if meta_path.exists():
    52	            meta = json.loads(meta_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    53	        prompt = prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip() if prompt_path.exists() else ""
    54	        event_count = len(read_jsonl(normalized_path)) if normalized_path.exists() else 0
    55	        rows.append(
    56	            {
    57	                "example_id": example_dir.name,
    58	                "prompt": prompt,
    59	                "capture_mode": meta.get("capture_mode", "unknown"),
    60	                "source_raw": meta.get("source_raw"),
    61	                "event_count": event_count,
    62	            }
    63	        )
    64	    return rows
    65	
    66	
    67	def find_examples_for_prompt(root: Path, prompt: str) -> list[str]:
    68	    needle = prompt.strip()
    69	    if not needle or not root.exists():
    70	        return []
    71	    matches: list[str] = []
    72	    for example_dir in sorted(path for path in root.iterdir() if path.is_dir()):
    73	        prompt_path = example_dir / "prompt.txt"
    74	        if not prompt_path.exists():
    75	            continue
    76	        candidate = prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()
    77	        if candidate == needle:
    78	            matches.append(example_dir.name)
    79	    return matches
    80	
    81	
    82	def promote_capture_to_example(
    83	    *,
    84	    capture_dir: Path,
    85	    output_root: Path,
    86	    example_id: str,
    87	    prompt: str | None = None,
    88	) -> Path:
    89	    example_dir = output_root / example_id
    90	    example_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    91	
    92	    prompt_text = prompt
    93	    prompt_path = capture_dir / "prompt.txt"
    94	    if prompt_text is None and prompt_path.exists():
    95	        prompt_text = prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()
    96	    prompt_text = prompt_text or ""
    97	
    98	    normalized_path = capture_dir / "normalized.jsonl"
    99	    stdout_path = capture_dir / "stdout.txt"
   100	    stderr_path = capture_dir / "stderr.txt"
   101	    meta_path = capture_dir / "meta.json"
   102	
   103	    (example_dir / "prompt.txt").write_text(prompt_text + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   104	    if stdout_path.exists():
   105	        shutil.copy2(stdout_path, example_dir / "observed.jsonl")
   106	    if normalized_path.exists():
   107	        shutil.copy2(normalized_path, example_dir / "normalized.jsonl")
   108	
   109	    meta: dict = {}
   110	    if meta_path.exists():
   111	        meta = json.loads(meta_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   112	    meta.update(
   113	        {
   114	            "example_id": example_id,
   115	            "promoted_from": str(capture_dir),
   116	            "prompt": prompt_text,
   117	            "capture_mode": meta.get("capture_mode", "live_capture"),
   118	        }
   119	    )
   120	    (example_dir / "meta.json").write_text(json.dumps(meta, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   121	
   122	    normalized = read_jsonl(example_dir / "normalized.jsonl") if (example_dir / "normalized.jsonl").exists() else []
   123	    report = build_report(
   124	        example_id=example_id,
   125	        prompt=prompt_text,
   126	        normalized_events=normalized,
   127	        notes=f"Promoted from capture session {capture_dir.name}. stderr_exists={stderr_path.exists()}",
   128	    )
   129	    (example_dir / "report.md").write_text(report + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   130	    return example_dir
   131	
   132	
   133	def import_normalized_trace_as_example(
   134	    *,
   135	    normalized_path: Path,
   136	    output_root: Path,
   137	    example_id: str,
   138	    prompt: str,
   139	    meta: dict | None = None,
   140	) -> Path:
   141	    example_dir = output_root / example_id
   142	    example_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   143	    normalized = read_jsonl(normalized_path)
   144	    (example_dir / "prompt.txt").write_text(prompt + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   145	    shutil.copy2(normalized_path, example_dir / "normalized.jsonl")
   146	    (example_dir / "observed.jsonl").write_text(normalized_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), encoding="utf-8")
   147	    payload = {
   148	        "example_id": example_id,
   149	        "prompt": prompt,
   150	        "capture_mode": "golden_trace",
   151	    }
   152	    if meta:
   153	        payload.update(meta)
   154	    (example_dir / "meta.json").write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   155	    (example_dir / "report.md").write_text(
   156	        build_report(
   157	            example_id=example_id,
   158	            prompt=prompt,
   159	            normalized_events=normalized,
   160	            notes="Imported from a real normalized trace.",
   161	        )
   162	        + "\n",
   163	        encoding="utf-8",
   164	    )
   165	    return example_dir
   166	
   167	
   168	def compare_capture_against_baselines(
   169	    *,
   170	    normalized_path: Path,
   171	    baselines_root: Path,
   172	) -> list[BaselineComparison]:
   173	    actual = read_jsonl(normalized_path)
   174	    results: list[BaselineComparison] = []
   175	    for example_dir in sorted(path for path in baselines_root.iterdir() if path.is_dir()):
   176	        baseline_normalized = example_dir / "normalized.jsonl"
   177	        if not baseline_normalized.exists():
   178	            continue
   179	        result: ComparisonResult = compare_normalized_sequences(read_jsonl(baseline_normalized), actual)
   180	        results.append(
   181	            BaselineComparison(
   182	                example_id=example_dir.name,
   183	                matches=result.matches,
   184	                summary=result.summary,
   185	                details=result.details,
   186	                score=result.score,
   187	            )
   188	        )
   189	    return results

    58	def load_eval_suite(path: Path = DEFAULT_EVAL_SUITE_PATH) -> list[EvalCase]:

    63	def detect_tool_family(normalized_path: Path | None) -> str:

    88	    results: list[RegressionResult] = []

    93	        session_id = f"regression-{case.example_id}-{datetime.now(UTC).strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%S%fZ')}"

   114	        artifact_present = _artifact_present(case.expected_artifact, summary)
   115	        artifact_ok = case.expected_artifact is None or artifact_present

   117	        drift_analysis = _drift_against_expected_golden(case.example_id, summary.normalized_path, goldens_dir)

   146	def build_regression_report(results: list[RegressionResult]) -> str:

   166	                f"- drift: {result.drift_summary}",

   171	            ]

   176	def write_regression_report(output_path: Path, results: list[RegressionResult]) -> Path:

   185	    return output_path

   187	
   188	def _score_against_expected_golden(example_id: str, normalized_path: Path | None, goldens_dir: Path) -> int | None:
   189	    if normalized_path is None or not normalized_path.exists():
   190	        return None
   191	    expected_path = goldens_dir / example_id / "normalized.jsonl"

   194	    result = compare_normalized_sequences(read_jsonl(expected_path), read_jsonl(normalized_path))

   198	def _drift_against_expected_golden(example_id: str, normalized_path: Path | None, goldens_dir: Path):

   210	    if expected_artifact == "approval":

    10	from .io import write_jsonl

    18	def _base_meta(example_id: str, prompt: str, capture_mode: str) -> dict:
    19	    return {
    20	        "example_id": example_id,
    21	        "captured_at": "2026-03-11T00:00:00Z",
    22	        "codex_source": {
    23	            "repo": "/Users/user/project/codex",
    24	            "commit": CODEX_COMMIT,
    25	        },
    26	        "model": "mixed-observation",
    27	        "capture_mode": capture_mode,

    29	        "prompt": prompt,
    30	    }
    31	
    32	
    33	def _simple_session(example_id: str, prompt: str, answer: str, *, with_deltas: bool = True) -> tuple[list[dict], list[dict]]:
    34	    observed = []
    35	    normalized = [
    36	        build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:00Z", source="inferred", channel="meta", event_type="session_start", payload={"example_id": example_id}, raw={"kind": "session_start"}),
    37	        build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:01Z", source="inferred", channel="cli", event_type="user_input", turn_id="turn-1", payload={"text": prompt}, raw={"kind": "user_input"}),
    38	        build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:02Z", source="inferred", channel="cli", event_type="task_started", turn_id="turn-1", payload={}, raw={"kind": "task_started"}),
    39	    ]
    40	    observed.extend(deepcopy(normalized))
    41	    if with_deltas:
    42	        for index, token in enumerate(answer.split(" "), start=3):
    43	            normalized.append(
    44	                build_event(
    45	                    ts=f"2026-03-11T00:00:{index:02d}Z",
    46	                    source="inferred",
    47	                    channel="cli",
    48	                    event_type="assistant_message_delta",
    49	                    turn_id="turn-1",
    50	                    payload={"delta": token if index == 3 else f" {token}"},
    51	                    raw={"kind": "assistant_message_delta"},
    52	                )
    53	            )
    54	    normalized.extend(
    55	        [
    56	            build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:10Z", source="inferred", channel="cli", event_type="assistant_message", turn_id="turn-1", message_id="turn-1", payload={"text": answer}, raw={"kind": "assistant_message"}),
    57	            build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:11Z", source="inferred", channel="cli", event_type="task_complete", turn_id="turn-1", payload={"last_agent_message": answer}, raw={"kind": "task_complete"}),
    58	            build_event(ts="2026-03-11T00:00:12Z", source="inferred", channel="meta", event_type="session_end", turn_id="turn-1", payload={}, raw={"kind": "session_end"}),
    59	        ]
    60	    )
    61	    observed.extend(deepcopy(normalized[3:]))
    62	    return observed, normalized
    63	
    64	
    65	def _tool_session(example_id: str, prompt: str, *, tool_count: int, failed: bool = False, request_input: bool = False) -> tuple[list[dict], list[dict], str]:
    66	    answer = "I checked the tool outputs and summarized the result."
    67	    observed, normalized = _simple_session(example_id, prompt, answer, with_deltas=False)
    68	    insert_at = 3
    69	    notes = []
    70	    for idx in range(tool_count):
    71	        call_id = f"call-{idx + 1}"
    72	        normalized.insert(
    73	            insert_at,
    74	            build_event(
    75	                ts=f"2026-03-11T00:00:{3 + idx:02d}Z",
    76	                source="inferred",
    77	                channel="tool",
    78	                event_type="tool_call_request",
    79	                turn_id="turn-1",
    80	                call_id=call_id,
    81	                payload={"tool_name": "shell", "arguments": {"command": f"echo step-{idx + 1}"}},
    82	                raw={"kind": "tool_call_request"},
    83	            ),
    84	        )
    85	        normalized.insert(
    86	            insert_at + 1,
    87	            build_event(
    88	                ts=f"2026-03-11T00:00:{4 + idx:02d}Z",
    89	                source="inferred",
    90	                channel="tool",
    91	                event_type="tool_call_result" if not failed or idx < tool_count - 1 else "tool_call_error",
    92	                turn_id="turn-1",
    93	                call_id=call_id,
    94	                payload={"status": "completed" if not failed or idx < tool_count - 1 else "failed", "output": f"step-{idx + 1}"},
    95	                raw={"kind": "tool_call_result"},
    96	            ),
    97	        )
    98	        notes.append(call_id)
    99	        insert_at += 2
   100	    if request_input:
   101	        normalized.insert(
   102	            insert_at,
   103	            build_event(
   104	                ts="2026-03-11T00:00:07Z",
   105	                source="inferred",

payload.text:
이 프로젝트는 "일반 애플리케이션"보다는 `Codex/ROMA 실행을 관찰하고, 정규화하고, baseline/golden과 비교하는 평가 툴킷`에 가깝습니다. README도 같은 방향으로 설명하고 있고, 핵심 사용 흐름을 `observe`, `chat`, `compare-baselines`, `run-regression`으로 잡고 있습니다. [README.md#L3](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L3) [README.md#L43](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L43) [README.md#L73](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L73)

구조는 크게 4축입니다.
- 제품 코드: `src/autonomos` 아래 28개 Python 모듈이 있고, CLI 엔트리포인트는 [`src/autonomos/cli.py#L45`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/cli.py#L45) 하나에 모여 있습니다. `chat`, `observe`, `review`, `resume`, `verify-runtime`, `run-regression` 같은 서브커맨드가 모두 여기서 라우팅됩니다. 패키징은 단순한 setuptools 기반이고 런타임 Python 의존성은 비어 있습니다. [pyproject.toml#L5](/Users/user/project/autonomos/pyproject.toml#L5) [pyproject.toml#L16](/Users/user/project/autonomos/pyproject.toml#L16)
- 실행 오케스트레이션: 실제 상위 흐름은 [`src/autonomos/app.py#L56`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/app.py#L56)의 `run_chat`과 [`src/autonomos/workflow.py#L51`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/workflow.py#L51)의 `observe_prompt`가 담당합니다. `run_chat`은 전략 선택, 정책 추론, ROMA 호출, baseline 비교, 메모리 저장까지 묶는 상위 조합기입니다.
- 전략/정책 계층: [`src/autonomos/strategy.py#L22`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/strategy.py#L22)에서 `simple_answer`, `tool_oriented`, `planning`, `safety_refusal` 같은 전략을 고르고, [`src/autonomos/policy.py#L35`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/policy.py#L35)에서 `structure_inspection`, `repository_inspection`, `code_review` 같은 정책으로 tool budget과 선호 도구를 결정합니다. 지금 요청 같은 "프로젝트 구조 분석"은 명시적으로 `tool_oriented`로 라우팅됩니다. [src/autonomos/strategy.py#L110](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/strategy.py#L110)
- 평가/데이터셋 계층: [`src/autonomos/baseline.py#L82`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/baseline.py#L82)에서 capture를 example로 승격하고, [`src/autonomos/baseline.py#L168`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/baseline.py#L168)에서 baseline 비교를 수행합니다. [`src/autonomos/regression.py#L77`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/regression.py#L77)과 [`src/autonomos/verification.py#L23`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/verification.py#L23)가 golden 기반 회귀/검증 러너입니다.

실행 런타임은 2갈래입니다.
- `observe` 계열은 `codex exec --json`을 호출하고 결과를 공통 JSONL 스키마로 정규화합니다. [src/autonomos/workflow.py#L83](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/workflow.py#L83)
- `chat` 기본값은 `roma_ws`이며, Node 브리지로 `roma-cli`를 호출합니다. [README.md#L59](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L59) [src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L42](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L42)
- 브리지 스크립트는 저장소 내부 `scripts/roma_bridge.mjs`지만, 실제 구현체 import는 외부 로컬 경로에 하드코딩돼 있습니다. [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7) [src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19)
- 이 브리지는 `list_dir`, `search_files`, `read_file`, `grep_text`, `glob_paths`, `bash` 같은 로컬 inspection 도구를 제공하고, 구조 분석 모드에서는 `bash`를 막고 내장 inspection tool 위주로 유도합니다. [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L70](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L70) [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L171](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L171)

디렉터리 관점에서 보면 코드보다 관찰 산출물이 큰 비중입니다.
- `captures`: 804개 파일
- `examples_live`: 80개 파일
- `examples`: 50개 파일
- `goldens`: 50개 파일
- `codex_traces`: 12개 파일
- `tests`: 34개 파일
- `src/autonomos`: 28개 파일

해석하면 이 저장소는 "라이브 실행 결과를 축적하고, 예제화하고, 기준선과 비교하는 실험/평가 저장소" 성격이 강합니다. `tests`도 모듈 단위보다는 시나리오 단위가 많아서 `test_app_roma_*`, `test_resume_flow`, `test_orchestration_artifacts`처럼 런타임 흐름 검증이 중심입니다. [tests](/Users/user/project/autonomos/tests)

중요한 관찰사항도 있습니다.
- 포터빌리티가 낮습니다. `roma-cli`와 Codex fixture가 외부 절대경로에 묶여 있습니다. [src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19) [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7) [src/autonomos/examples.py#L14](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/examples.py#L14)
- `fixtures/` 디렉터리는 현재 비어 있고, example 생성은 내부 fixture가 아니라 외부 Codex repo fixture를 참조합니다. [src/autonomos/examples.py#L117](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/examples.py#L117)
- `pyproject.toml`에는 Python 의존성이 거의 없지만, 실제 실행은 Node와 외부 `roma-cli` 환경에 의존합니다. [pyproject.toml#L11](/Users/user/project/autonomos/pyproject.toml#L11)

원하시면 다음 단계로 이어서 해드릴 수 있습니다.
1. `src/autonomos` 내부를 모듈별 책임도로 더 세분화
2. 실제 실행 흐름을 `chat` 기준 시퀀스 다이어그램처럼 정리
3. 구조 개선 포인트만 따로 뽑아서 리팩터링 제안

item.text:
이 프로젝트는 "일반 애플리케이션"보다는 `Codex/ROMA 실행을 관찰하고, 정규화하고, baseline/golden과 비교하는 평가 툴킷`에 가깝습니다. README도 같은 방향으로 설명하고 있고, 핵심 사용 흐름을 `observe`, `chat`, `compare-baselines`, `run-regression`으로 잡고 있습니다. [README.md#L3](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L3) [README.md#L43](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L43) [README.md#L73](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L73)

구조는 크게 4축입니다.
- 제품 코드: `src/autonomos` 아래 28개 Python 모듈이 있고, CLI 엔트리포인트는 [`src/autonomos/cli.py#L45`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/cli.py#L45) 하나에 모여 있습니다. `chat`, `observe`, `review`, `resume`, `verify-runtime`, `run-regression` 같은 서브커맨드가 모두 여기서 라우팅됩니다. 패키징은 단순한 setuptools 기반이고 런타임 Python 의존성은 비어 있습니다. [pyproject.toml#L5](/Users/user/project/autonomos/pyproject.toml#L5) [pyproject.toml#L16](/Users/user/project/autonomos/pyproject.toml#L16)
- 실행 오케스트레이션: 실제 상위 흐름은 [`src/autonomos/app.py#L56`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/app.py#L56)의 `run_chat`과 [`src/autonomos/workflow.py#L51`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/workflow.py#L51)의 `observe_prompt`가 담당합니다. `run_chat`은 전략 선택, 정책 추론, ROMA 호출, baseline 비교, 메모리 저장까지 묶는 상위 조합기입니다.
- 전략/정책 계층: [`src/autonomos/strategy.py#L22`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/strategy.py#L22)에서 `simple_answer`, `tool_oriented`, `planning`, `safety_refusal` 같은 전략을 고르고, [`src/autonomos/policy.py#L35`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/policy.py#L35)에서 `structure_inspection`, `repository_inspection`, `code_review` 같은 정책으로 tool budget과 선호 도구를 결정합니다. 지금 요청 같은 "프로젝트 구조 분석"은 명시적으로 `tool_oriented`로 라우팅됩니다. [src/autonomos/strategy.py#L110](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/strategy.py#L110)
- 평가/데이터셋 계층: [`src/autonomos/baseline.py#L82`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/baseline.py#L82)에서 capture를 example로 승격하고, [`src/autonomos/baseline.py#L168`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/baseline.py#L168)에서 baseline 비교를 수행합니다. [`src/autonomos/regression.py#L77`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/regression.py#L77)과 [`src/autonomos/verification.py#L23`](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/verification.py#L23)가 golden 기반 회귀/검증 러너입니다.

실행 런타임은 2갈래입니다.
- `observe` 계열은 `codex exec --json`을 호출하고 결과를 공통 JSONL 스키마로 정규화합니다. [src/autonomos/workflow.py#L83](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/workflow.py#L83)
- `chat` 기본값은 `roma_ws`이며, Node 브리지로 `roma-cli`를 호출합니다. [README.md#L59](/Users/user/project/autonomos/README.md#L59) [src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L42](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L42)
- 브리지 스크립트는 저장소 내부 `scripts/roma_bridge.mjs`지만, 실제 구현체 import는 외부 로컬 경로에 하드코딩돼 있습니다. [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L7) [src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19](/Users/user/project/autonomos/src/autonomos/roma_runtime.py#L19)
- 이 브리지는 `list_dir`, `search_files`, `read_file`, `grep_text`, `glob_paths`, `bash` 같은 로컬 inspection 도구를 제공하고, 구조 분석 모드에서는 `bash`를 막고 내장 inspection tool 위주로 유도합니다. [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L70](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L70) [scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L171](/Users/user/project/autonomos/scripts/roma_bridge.mjs#L171)

- `examples`: 50개 파일

- `codex_traces`: 12개 파일
- `tests`: 34개 파일
- `src/autonomos`: 28개 파일
